name: ExtensionAdministrableProductDefinition_Description
title: R5: A general description of the product, when in its final form, suitable for administration e.g. effervescent blue liquid, to be swallowed (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `AdministrableProductDefinition.description` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`AdministrableProductDefinition.description` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `AdministrableProductDefinition.description` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.description` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `AdministrableProductDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.description` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: A general description of the product, when in its final form, suitable for administration e.g. effervescent blue liquid, to be swallowed (new)

element.definition: A general description of the product, when in its final form, suitable for administration e.g. effervescent blue liquid, to be swallowed. Intended to be used when the other structured properties of this resource are insufficient or cannot be supported. It is not intended to duplicate information already carried elswehere.
